property.name: globalMessage
property.value: Program broadcast: The main structure has severely melted, all commands have been urgently stopped.

property.name: globalMessage_zh
property.value: 离心机程序广播：主体结构发生严重融毁，已紧急停止所有命令。

property.name: globalMessage
property.value: Program Broadcast: Data downlink received successfully, furnace cleaning program is being executed, expected to take 3 minutes.

property.name: globalMessage_zh
property.value: 离心机程序广播：数据下行接收成功，清炉程序正在执行中，预计需要八分钟。

property.name: globalMessage
property.value: Program Broadcast: The cleaning command has been executed and the excess resources have been distributed to the relay unit owners.

property.name: globalMessage_zh
property.value: 离心机程序广播：清理命令执行完毕，已将过剩资源分发给连接方。
